suspicious_activity.narrative: Cindy Clayton, DOB 1961-08-31, residing at 08330 Robert Stravenue, Garciaberg, AL, engaged in suspicious structuring activities from 2025-02-05 to 2025-08-02. Multiple transactions were conducted just below $10,000, including ATM withdrawals of $7,491.44 and $5,774.15 on 2025-07-31 and 2025-08-01, respectively. Frequent cash deposits, such as $6,933.66 on 2025-08-02, were noted. These activities are inconsistent with her profile as an applications developer with an annual income of $163,820. Account IDs: CUST_0057_ACC_1, CUST_0057_ACC_2, CUST_0057_ACC_3. Filing under 31 CFR 1020.320 and 12 CFR 21.11 due to structuring indicators.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: Multiple transactions just below $10,000, frequent ATM withdrawals and deposits, high-risk rating, and significant transaction volume compared to income.
